DP.370.0001:
[0103,0000]: Hey, if we run into a
Pokémon, I’m gonna catch it somehow.\f
Because I’m gonna be a Pokémon
Trainer.\f
You know what a Trainer does, right?
Makes Pokémon battle and all that?
DP.370.0002:
[0103,0000]: Pokémon all have
different moves, huh?\f
A Trainer makes his Pokémon battle
by ordering them to use moves.\f
That’s so awesomely cool.
DP.370.0003:
[0103,0000]: I want Pokémon of my
own, and not too soon, either.\f
I’d be able to go everywhere with my
Pokémon that way.
DP.370.0004:
[0103,0000]: That lake has a mirage
Pokémon living in it.\f
Everyone says nothing lives there,
but I know I’m right.
DP.370.0005:
[0103,0000]: I’m gonna become
a Pokémon Trainer for sure.\f
Not just any Trainer either.
I’m going to be the greatest ever.\r
That’s my dream.
DP.370.0006:
[0103,0000]: Hey, that’s enough
talking already.\f
I’m itching to get going to the lake.
Come on, come on!
DP.370.0007:
[0103,0000]: All right!
Let’s move out! Hustle up!
DP.370.0008:
[0103,0000]: We didn’t have any
choice in using those people’s\r
Pokémon, right?\f
But these Pokémon belong to them...
They’ll want them back, won’t they?\f
But this is the first Pokémon I’ve
ever battled with...
DP.370.0009:
[0103,0000]: I wish I could grow
tougher with this little guy...
DP.370.0010:
[0103,0000]: I don’t feel like
talking... Let’s go.\f
...Are we maybe walking slower than
when we went to the lake?
DP.370.0011:
Cheryl: Wait!
Please wait, [0103,0000]!\f
If you use an Escape Rope now,
you know that you’ll leave me behind?
DP.370.0012:
Cheryl: Wait!
Please wait, [0103,0000]!\f
If you use Teleport now, you know
that you’ll leave me behind?
DP.370.0013:
Cheryl: This place...
They say it’s a haunted mansion...\f
I’m sorry, but it’s too creepy.
May we go, please?
DP.370.0014:
Cheryl: It’s startling to see two wild
Pokémon appearing at the same time.
DP.370.0015:
Cheryl: My Pokémon is an excellent
healer.\f
But attacking isn’t its strong point.
DP.370.0016:
Cheryl: [0103,0000], battling with
you makes me feel elated.\f
If I could predict what you’re about
to do, we would make a fierce combo!
DP.370.0018:
Mira: Are you going to use that?
I will be left all alone...
DP.370.0019:
Mira: Are you going to use that?
I will be left all alone...
DP.370.0020:
Mira: That isn’t the right way.
I’ll be lost if we go down...
DP.370.0021:
Mira: I like helpful Pokémon moves
like Growl and Minimize.\f
Those kinds of moves are my
favorites.
DP.370.0022:
Mira: This cave...
It’s so easy to get confused here.\r
Do you know where we are?
DP.370.0023:
Mira: [0103,0000], did you get to be
so good because you’re always with\r
your Pokémon?\f
Yes! That has to be it!
I will try like you!
DP.370.0024:
Riley: If you use that, I’ll have to
wave good-bye to you now.
DP.370.0025:
Riley: If you use that move, I’ll have
to wave good-bye to you now.
DP.370.0026:
Riley: Haha, I’d have to agree.\f
People training here would be those
with too much time on their hands.
DP.370.0027:
Riley: This used to be a fairly
thriving ore mine once upon a time.\f
I guess the steel ore’s played out.
There’s only Pokémon here now.
DP.370.0028:
Riley: Have you met Byron?
The Leader of Canalave Gym?\f
He’s asked me to become a Gym
Leader, but there’s his son Roark\r
to consider as well.
DP.370.0029:
Riley: Imagine what it would be like
for a Steel-type Pokémon user to\r
battle a Steel type.\f
Would that be like battling yourself,
I wonder?\f
I mean, it’s a lot harder to defeat
one’s self than anyone else.
DP.370.0030:
Riley: What’s going on here, though?
The native Pokémon are restless...\f
I don’t like this...
Let’s hurry.
DP.370.0031:
Riley: Thanks.
You really helped me out.\f
Listen, I have a Pokémon here
named Luca.\f
Would you take it with you?\f
DP.370.0032:
Riley: Thanks!\f
I want you to show Luca all sorts
of worlds.\f
DP.370.0033:
Riley: Thank you...\f
But you don’t have room to take
another Pokémon.\f
All right, then.
I’ll wait here for you.
DP.370.0034:
Riley: I hope you’ll accept it as
a token of our friendship.
DP.370.0035:
Riley: Spending time with you was
very enjoyable.\f
I intend to test my skills in other
places from now on.\f
It would be great if we could meet
again.\f
DP.370.0036:
Marley: ...Are you going to leave
me here?
DP.370.0037:
Marley: ...Are you going to leave
me here?
DP.370.0038:
Marley: ...Sorry, but I’m not
going up.
DP.370.0042:
Buck: Whoa, [0103,0000]!\f
If you use that, me and my Pokémon
will be left behind. Don’t do it!
DP.370.0043:
Buck: Whoa, [0103,0000]!\f
If you use that, me and my Pokémon
will be left behind. Don’t do it!
DP.370.0044:
Buck: Why do I like the volcano
so much?\f
I don’t really have a good reason
for it, but I don’t really need one.
DP.370.0045:
Buck: There’s no law that says
I have to be tough or anything,\r
but losing isn’t fair to my Pokémon.\f
After all, they try so hard for me.\f
I think it’s my responsibility as a
Trainer to recognize their hard work.
DP.370.0046:
Buck: My big brother’s one of the
Elite Four.\f
So, of course it’s only normal that
I’d be better than ordinary folks.\f
But that’s not what I want.
I want to be tough on my own terms.\f
It wouldn’t be fair to the Pokémon
that chose to be with me.
DP.370.0047:
Buck: It might be cool being a Gym
Leader or one of the Elite Four...\f
But, then again, it sounds like it’d
be a lot of hard work!
